calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Nhi Le.
Default was entered against defendant on July 27, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Nhi Le as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,382.12.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,093.04.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $423.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,898.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
